---
title: "anyway"
output: html_document
---

```{r, echo=FALSE}
df <- read.csv("Students Social Media Addiction.csv")
head(df)
```


Data Exploration

```{r}
# str(df)


# check for NA's
sum(is.na(df))

rows <- nrow(df)
rows
df <- na.omit(df)
rows <- nrow(df)
rows

names(df)
str(df)

# create indexing for binary v.s. continuous

```

```{r}
table(df$Age)
```
